# Mian Zhang / Ouroboros Project

Public entry: https://mianzhang.org/
Technical mirror: https://mmjbds-mianzhang-org.static.hf.space/

Latest public note:
https://mianzhang.org/press/public-launch-2026-06-15.html

Canonical archive:
https://zenodo.org/records/20027295

Summary:
Mian Zhang is an independent researcher building the Ouroboros Project: evidence-gated AI systems, proof-carrying action, learning from failure, cognitive immunity, relational observability, and reliable high-risk action boundaries. Public materials are research records, DOI routes, evidence maps, demos, registries, concept entries, issue routes, and counterexample targets. They are not production guarantees, real-time trading claims, medical claims, customer deployments, or private-system disclosures.

Core public entry points:
- Home: https://mianzhang.org/
- Papers and DOI map: https://mianzhang.org/papers/
- Evidence map: https://mianzhang.org/evidence/
- Concepts: https://mianzhang.org/concepts/
- Public press archive: https://mianzhang.org/press/
- GitHub community route: https://mianzhang.org/community/
- Counterexamples: https://mianzhang.org/counterexamples/
- Public roadmap: https://mianzhang.org/docs/public-roadmap.html
- Weekly digest: https://mianzhang.org/docs/weekly-digest-2026-06-15.html
- Search discovery entry: https://mianzhang.org/docs/search-discovery-2026-06-15.html
- Search index weekly report: https://mianzhang.org/docs/search-index-weekly-report-2026-06-15.html
- External submission status: https://mianzhang.org/docs/external-submission-status-2026-06-15.html
- External submission action pack: https://mianzhang.org/docs/external-submission-action-pack-2026-06-15.html

- Sitemap: https://mianzhang.org/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://mianzhang.org/robots.txt

- Self-Certification Grounding Check: https://mianzhang.org/concepts/self-certification-grounding-check.html

- Zenodo portfolio index: https://zenodo.org/records/20027295

Public claim boundary:
- Public materials may describe papers, datasets, registries, demos, schemas, claim-to-evidence tables, artifact scope, concept definitions, issue templates, and counterexample routes.
- Public materials do not prove general intelligence, general safety, production readiness, customer readiness, real-time trading returns, real robot deployment, medical validity, or private execution quality.
- Public materials do not disclose credentials, customer data, private logs, private orchestration, commercial scheduling, private review material, or non-public execution traces.
- Cite per-paper DOI records for paper-specific claims; use the Zenodo portfolio record only as the archive index.
